content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
Advice File Summary
PLEASE FILL IN ALL THE BLANKS!

Type:___Telephone___ Staff:____CASSADY, LYNDA____
Year:_______91_______ Adviser:___Purcell, W.____
No.:_________________ Requestor:_____________
Date:____1-21-91____ Agency:____T.A.+ A_____

Subject: ___ C/I _____________ ___ C/I Code
___ Campaign _____________ ___ Lobbying
___ SEI _____________ ___ Revolving Door
___ Section 84308 _____________ ___ Personal Use
___ Mass Mail _____________ ___ Misc.

Computer Entry Summary: (No more than 5 typed lines for summary.)
_________________________________________________________________

When a lobbyist drives a legislator
to a social event such transportation is a
gift and is subject to the gift limitation.

_________________________________________________________________

Code Section and/or Regulation Nos.

_________________________________________________________________

Section 82028, 86203

_________________________________________________________________

Bulletin Summary: (If you need more space please write on back.)

_________________________________________________________________

When a lobbyist drives a legislator
to a social event the transportation
of a gift and is subject to
the gift limitation. Discussion
on determining fair market value.

_________________________________________________________________

_________________________________________________________________

Do not file in

_________________________________________________________________

_________________________________________________________________

_________________________________________________________________

(Rev. 5/10/90)

sections.question_synthetic: Whether transportation provided by a lobbyist to a legislator attending a social event constitutes a gift subject to gift limitations under FPPC law.
sections.conclusion_synthetic: When a lobbyist drives a legislator to a social event, the transportation constitutes a gift subject to gift limitations, with analysis required to determine the fair market value of the transportation.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: Document is a telephone advice summary with no formal question/conclusion sections. Information extracted from Computer Entry Summary and Bulletin Summary sections. Requestor and specific date details provided; agency listed as T.A.+A with staff member Cassaday, Lyrda.

embedding.qa_text:
QUESTION: Whether transportation provided by a lobbyist to a legislator attending a social event constitutes a gift subject to gift limitations under FPPC law.

CONCLUSION: When a lobbyist drives a legislator to a social event, the transportation constitutes a gift subject to gift limitations, with analysis required to determine the fair market value of the transportation.

embedding.summary: FPPC advice letter determining that transportation provided by a lobbyist to a legislator for attendance at a social event is a gift subject to gift limitations under Sections 82028 and 86203.
